_about: Residual byte regions not covered by the semantic tables (annotated by neighbourhood). The builder writes new_hex at file_offset after asserting old_hex.

entries.what: preserved current/max HP format strings in retired atlas tail
entries.why: the live 12x12 atlas is relocated to 0x023027A0, leaving the original in-image atlas retired. Its final 8 bytes are resident below BSS, outside stage/heap memory, do not overlap the two atlas code caves, and had no remaining consumer before this reservation. Four HP callers are repointed here by utils/arm9_layout.py.
